race.description: Supagas Wagga Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: XTRASCENT (1) showed early speed from an outside draw when resuming and led for much of the way, only to be collared late but with a healthy margin back to the rest. Fitter and gets the key booking of Loy. Will take catching. UNDER WRAPS (2) was well supported when resuming last start but tired in the lane at Corowa. Debuts the blinkers and should look to push forward again from the wide alley. Back to the 1000m could also prove the trick. REDS EXPRESS (7) is close to breaking through after three consecutive placings, the latest at Queanbeyan. Drops back to a preferred trip, recording three minor placings and shapes as one to consider. FIRE CHAT (5) gave a good sight last time at Albury before being claimed late. Strips rock-hard fit, though has the wide alley to contend. In the mix.
